entry.title: New BOA N0001921G0017 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SUPPLIES OR SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF THE MH-60R AIRCRAFT, NONRECURRING ENGINEERING (NRE) AND RECURRING PRODUCTION (ADDS/DELETES).

entry.title: BOA N0001921G0017 (P00001) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DELETE AND REPLACE ATTACHMENT (4) BOM TEMPLATE, ATTACHMENT (5) GFE LIST, ATTACHMENT (9) WARRANTY AND ATTACHMENT (10) DD-254 IN SECTION J.

entry.title: BOA N0001921G0017 (P00002) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ANNUAL CLAUSE UPDATE, REVISION TO SECTION J ATTACHMENTS AND INCORPORATE NEW CDRL C004.
